chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT LARKANA Constitutional Petition No.S-257 of 2025 ________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF HON’BLE JUDGE_________ 1. For orders on office objection “A” 2. For hearing of main case. 15-09-2025 Mr. Munwar Ali Abbasi, Assistant Advocate General, assisted by Mr. Sardar Ali Solangi, Deputy Prosecutor General. -------- None present for the petitioner, same was the position on last date of hearing. It appears that the parties have lost interest in pursuing this matter. However, in the interest of justice, since the petitioner apprehend danger to her life, therefore, the official respondents are directed to conduct themselves strictly in accordance with the law and provide protection to the petitioner as and when required. The petition stands disposed of. JUDGE Asghar Altaf/P.A
